cardiac_chest_pain.description: Chest pain with arm, jaw, neck, or back pain, shortness of breath, sweating, or fainting

stroke_neuro.description: Face drooping, arm weakness, speech difficulty, sudden one-sided weakness, confusion, or vision loss

headache.description: Sudden severe headache, worst headache, or headache with seizure, weakness, confusion, vision loss, stiff neck, fever, rash, or head injury

breathing.description: Severe breathing difficulty, blue lips, inability to speak full sentences, collapse, or unresponsiveness

fever_sepsis_meningitis.description: Fever with confusion, stiff neck, seizure, concerning rash, or unresponsiveness

trauma_bleeding.description: Severe bleeding, seizure, loss of consciousness, or major trauma warning signs

anaphylaxis.description: Anaphylaxis symptoms such as throat/tongue swelling, wheezing after allergen, or allergic reaction with breathing difficulty
